text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm eating lunch in the cafeteria, when...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...This is awful. They're out of salad again. Sigh... There go my grand lunch plans.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... This is most interesting news. The salad
has spoiled King's lunch...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But I'm first-rate, so I can't give up now... Sigh. I guess I'll just have to get my vitamins from some candied nuts.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Candied nuts?! H-how... extraordinary! Does she
really eat such extravagant-sounding food?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh, no I can't. There has to be something more
nutritious.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Who's that whispering nearby? Is that you,
Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How could I not? Thanks to all your mumbling, I
can't even hear myself think.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Because of your lunch! I heard you always eat
first-rate food!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess, I want to strive to eat elegant
meals like yours... So I'd like you to teach me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You mean you came here so that you could learn
how to become a lovely and sweet first-rate
Umamusume like me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why didn't you say something sooner? I'd be
happy to mentor you. ♪ I'll lay out my entire
dietary plan for you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
First up, get a pen and paper ready! Time is
precious if you really want to become first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a surprising turn of events, they both begin to
fervently discuss meal plans.
